creator: george@m5p.com
text:
Before I comment further, it appears we are up to version 112, and my problem was on 111.  So let me update and let you know what happens.

But in brief, mostly I compile with standard defaults, except that I disable CUPS.  Comparing with the FreshPorts listing, for firefox itself my nondefault options are PROFILE off, ALSA on, and JACK, PULSEAUDIO, and SNDIO off.
